hero.badge: AI verification, automation and trust in one flow
hero.description: VeriFlow helps companies verify documents, applications, deals and user data using AI logic, secure rules and automated scenarios.

features.title: Platform Features
features.description: Ready-made AI modules for verification, routing, automation and analytics — all inside one stylish platform.

verification.title: Verification Engine
verification.desc: Verification of documents, applications and profiles using rules, sources and AI risk assessment.

decision.title: AI Decision Layer
decision.desc: Smart recommendations, scoring and automated decisions for common cases.

flow.title: Flow Automation
flow.desc: Configurable action chains from data upload to final status and notifications.

security.title: Trust & Security
security.desc: Encryption, audit logs and transparent verification history for every process.

api.title: API First
api.desc: Connect VeriFlow with CRM, CMS, landing pages, internal systems and SaaS services.

analytics.title: Live Analytics
analytics.desc: Dashboards for statuses, errors, conversions, processing speed and data quality.

workflow.title: How VeriFlow Works
workflow.description: Users upload data, AI checks the context, the system launches the correct scenario and returns a clear result.

step2.title: Verification
step2.desc: AI analysis, rules and risk scoring.

cta.title: VeriFlow — verified data, automated flow.
cta.description: A stylish AI service for websites, products and internal business processes.

login.title: Sign in to VeriFlow
login.subtitle: Access your AI verification dashboard and automation tools.

signup.title: Get started with VeriFlow
signup.subtitle: Create your account and start automating verification workflows.

settings.subtitle: Update your profile details and account credentials.
